metadata.description: A discipline layer for building software with AI sessions — roles, artifacts, and cross-vendor review that let a technical owner delegate to AI sessions and ship on evidence.

plugins.name: superheroes
plugins.description: Showrunner + Workhorse + The Architect + Review Crew + Test-Pilot — one plugin: the discipline layer around AI build sessions (brief → build → cross-vendor review → ready PR → vet → merge).
